heading: Administrative provisions
label: 7545 Administrative provisions
text: Not more than 5 percent of funds provided to an award recipient under this part for any fiscal year may be used for administrative purposes.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7545, , as added , , , related to State applications, prior to the general amendment of former subchapter VII of this chapter by .Pub. L. 89–10, title VII, § 7305Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101108 Stat. 3741Pub. L. 107–110Oct. 20, 1994

Amendments2015—, amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section set out various administrative provisions relating to applications for grants and awards under this part, consisting of subsecs. (a) to (d).Pub. L. 114–95, § 6004(d)

Effective Date of 2015 AmendmentAmendment by effective , except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 114–95section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95section 6301 of this titleDec. 10, 2015
